prompt: Add a notifications module to the ops console: per-user message queues with send(user, message), list(user), clear(user); a config key notifications.maxQueue (positive integer, default 50) capping each user's queue — when full, the oldest message is dropped; emit an event when a message is queued; add a CLI command 'notify <user> <message>'; document the module. Follow the existing conventions of this codebase throughout.
